---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for SpendWise
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem It Solves

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.
> e.g. "I'm always frustrated when I can't filter expenses by date range..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. How should it work?

## Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## API / UI Mockup (Optional)

If applicable, add any rough API endpoint design or UI mockup to help explain the feature.

```json
// Example request/response
GET /api/expenses/?start_date=2024-01-01&end_date=2024-01-31
```

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.
